name: Ada Indoor Country Club
about: Ada Indoor Country Club is West Michigan's premier indoor golf facility, providing patrons with a comfortable and private space to hit virtual links on Golf Digest's top-ranked premium simulators. The venue offers a unique indoor golf simulator and bar experience, featuring private simulator bays for up to 6 people per bay, with hourly rates available. Located just outside the Ada Downtown District, it is conveniently close to popular area restaurants, breweries, and golf courses, making it a versatile destination for both locals and visitors seeking an unforgettable golf outing or social event.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Golf Digest-ranked simulators for high-quality virtual golf experiences
Private simulator bays accommodating up to 6 people for group outings
Convenient location near restaurants, breweries, and golf courses for a complete experience
Versatile venue capable of hosting various events from corporate to bachelor parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available (Maple Hill Launch Kitchen mentioned)
Bar experience with full bar service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf simulator equipment, though bringing your own clubs is optional if you prefer them.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full kitchen and bar available on-site, with no mention of allowing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The typical duration for 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and group size, but standard golf simulator rounds usually take 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes children, offering activities suitable for all ages including family fun nights.
